subject_pattern: Storm Alert: {AREA} - Tonight {TIME_WINDOW} - Tornadoes + 80 mph Wind Possible
subject_examples: Storm Alert: Your County, ST - Tonight 9 PM-Midnight - Tornadoes + 80 mph Wind Possible
tone: Action-oriented. Name the threat, name the window. 'STRONG TORNADOES POSSIBLE - TONIGHT 9 PM to MIDNIGHT.'
send_when: Imminent. Hours away. Strong tornadoes or damaging wind expected within 6 hours.
